name: Upside-Down Pizza Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, brown the ground beef, onions, and bell pepper until cooked through. Drain excess fat.
3. Stir in pizza sauce, pepperoni, Italian seasoning, and sliced mushrooms. Bring mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low; simmer uncovered for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. In a small bowl, combine milk, oil, and eggs. Beat for 1 minute at medium speed.
6. Lightly spoon flour into a measuring cup and level off. Add flour and salt to the egg mixture. Beat until smooth, about 2 minutes at medium speed.
7. Spoon meat mixture evenly into an ungreased 13x9-inch baking dish.
8. Place cheese slices over the hot meat mixture.
9. Pour topping evenly over cheese, covering completely. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
10. Bake at 400°F for 20-30 minutes or until puffed and deep golden brown. Makes 6-8 servings.
